reference: ONE AFTERNOON WHEN HE RETURNED AFTER A REST TO MISTER WICKER'S STUDY HE SAW THAT THERE WAS SOMETHING NEW IN THE ROOM A BOWL WITH A GOLDFISH IN IT STOOD ON THE TABLE BUT MISTER WICKER WAS NOT TO BE SEEN
text: one afternoon when he had returned after a rest to mr wicker's study he saw that there was something new in the room a bowl with a goldfish in it stood on the table but mr wicker was not to be seen
